info.description: REST API for the eCommerce admin panel and public storefront. Supports JWT authentication with role-based access (admin, customer). Store endpoints under /api/v1/store are public; account routes require a customer token.
info.title: eCommerce API

get.description: Returns a welcome message. Requires admin role.
Get list of all blog categories for admin panel.

post.description: Create a new blog category.

get.description: Get details of a single blog category by ID.

put.description: Update details of an existing blog category.

delete.description: Delete a blog category by ID.

get.description: Get a paginated list of all blog comments.

delete.description: Delete a blog comment by ID.

patch.description: Convenience alias for PATCH .../status with status approved.
Convenience alias for PATCH .../status with status rejected.
Approve or reject a blog comment by ID.

get.description: Get a paginated list of all posts (drafts and published).

post.description: Create a new blog post.

get.description: Get details of a single post by ID.

put.description: Update details of an existing blog post.

delete.description: Delete a blog post by ID.

get.description: Get a paginated list of product brands.

post.description: Create a new product brand.

get.description: Get a brand by ID.

put.description: Update an existing brand.

delete.description: Soft-delete a brand.

get.description: Get paginated categories or a nested tree with tree=true.

post.description: Create a new product category with optional parent for hierarchy.

get.description: Get a category by ID.

put.description: Update an existing category. Cannot set parent to self or descendant.

delete.description: Soft-delete a category. Fails if it has children or assigned products.

get.description: Get a paginated list of contact messages.

parameters.description: Search query by name, email, or subject
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Filter messages created on or after date (YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: from

parameters.description: Filter messages created on or before date (YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: to

get.description: Returns unread and total contact message counts for the admin nav badge.
Get details of a single contact message.

delete.description: Delete a contact message.

patch.description: Convenience alias for PATCH .../status with status archived.
Convenience alias for PATCH .../status with status read.
Update status of a contact message.

get.description: Get a paginated list of coupons with optional search.

post.description: Create a new discount coupon.

get.description: Get a coupon by ID.

put.description: Update an existing coupon.

delete.description: Soft-delete a coupon.

get.description: Get a paginated list of customers with optional search by name or email.
Get a customer by ID with addresses and purchase statistics.

put.description: Update a storefront customer profile.

delete.description: Delete a customer without existing orders.

get.description: Get paginated order history for a customer.
Get active featured products for the dashboard widget.
Get paginated products where quantity is at or below the low-stock threshold.
Get the latest orders for the dashboard feed.
Get time-series revenue and order counts. Use period preset or custom from/to dates.
Get aggregated KPIs: revenue, orders, customers, products, pending orders, and low stock count.
Returns the storefront navigation menu tree.

put.description: Replaces the storefront navigation menu tree.

get.description: Returns paginated admin notifications with optional read filter.
Returns unread and total notification counts for the admin header badge.
Get a paginated list of orders with optional search and filters.

parameters.description: Search by order number or customer
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Filter orders created on or after date (YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: from

parameters.description: Filter orders created on or before date (YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: to

post.description: Create a manual order with line items, addresses, and optional coupon.

get.description: Get full order detail with items, customer, addresses, and status timeline.

post.description: Cancel a pending or processing order and restore product inventory.

get.description: Get printable invoice payload with store and order details.

patch.description: Save internal order notes without changing status.

post.description: Process a full or partial refund on a delivered, paid order.

patch.description: Transition order through the fulfillment workflow. Invalid transitions return 422.

get.description: Get a paginated list of attribute values, optionally filtered by attribute_id.

post.description: Create a value for a global product attribute.

get.description: Get a paginated list of global attribute definitions.

post.description: Create a global product attribute definition.

get.description: Get a paginated list of products with optional filters.

post.description: Create a new product with images, attributes, and inventory.

get.description: Search products by name, SKU, or description.
Get product catalog KPI counts for dashboard cards.
Get a product by ID with images, attributes, and inventory.

put.description: Update an existing product. Supports partial updates.

delete.description: Soft-delete a product. Fails if referenced by active orders.

patch.description: Adjust stock quantity and low-stock threshold for a product.

get.description: Get a paginated list of all portfolio projects.

post.description: Create a new portfolio project.

get.description: Get list of all project categories for admin panel.

post.description: Create a new project category.

get.description: Get details of a single project category by ID.

put.description: Update details of an existing project category.

delete.description: Delete a project category by ID.

get.description: Get details of a single project by ID.

put.description: Update details of an existing portfolio project.

delete.description: Delete a portfolio project by ID.

get.description: Get a paginated list of product questions.

parameters.description: Search query by question content or asker name
parameters.name: q

delete.description: Delete a product question.

post.description: Answer a product question.

get.description: Get a paginated list of reviews for admin moderation.

delete.description: Delete a product review.

post.description: Post an admin reply to a top-level product review.

patch.description: Approve or reject a product review.

get.description: Returns public contact information.

put.description: Updates public contact information.

get.description: Returns search-engine and metadata configuration.

put.description: Updates search-engine and metadata configuration.

get.description: Returns storefront identity settings (name, URL, logo, favicon).

put.description: Updates storefront identity settings.

get.description: Returns social media profile URLs.

put.description: Updates social media profile URLs.

get.description: Returns the current store style with resolved design tokens.

put.description: Updates active theme, color tokens, and font family.

get.description: Returns the homepage contact section image URL.

put.description: Updates the homepage contact section image URL.

get.description: Returns the FAQ section image configuration.

put.description: Updates the FAQ section image.

get.description: Returns all FAQ Q&A items.

post.description: Creates an FAQ Q&A item.

put.description: Updates an FAQ Q&A item.

delete.description: Deletes an FAQ Q&A item.

get.description: Returns the singleton homepage hero configuration.

put.description: Updates the singleton homepage hero configuration.

get.description: Returns all homepage customer testimonials.

post.description: Creates a homepage customer testimonial.

put.description: Updates a homepage customer testimonial.

delete.description: Deletes a homepage customer testimonial.

get.description: Returns the storefront header navigation menu tree.

put.description: Replaces the storefront header navigation menu tree.

get.description: Returns all homepage partner brand blocks.

post.description: Creates a homepage partner brand block.

put.description: Updates a homepage partner brand block.

delete.description: Deletes a homepage partner brand block.

get.description: Returns all promotional homepage banners.

post.description: Creates a promotional homepage banner.

put.description: Updates a promotional homepage banner.

delete.description: Deletes a promotional homepage banner.

put.description: Updates a product slide item sort order or tab label.

delete.description: Removes a product from a carousel slide.

get.description: Returns all homepage product carousel configurations.

put.description: Updates a product carousel configuration by slide type.

post.description: Adds a product to a product carousel slide.

get.description: Returns available themes with purchase status for the current admin user.

post.description: Records a theme purchase for the current admin user.
Upload an image file (product image, logo, favicon). Returns a public URL.

get.description: Get a paginated list of admin panel user accounts.

post.description: Create a new admin panel user account.

get.description: Get an admin panel user by ID.

put.description: Update an admin panel user account.

delete.description: Soft-delete an admin user. Cannot delete yourself or the last active admin.

post.description: Request a password reset email. Always returns success to avoid email enumeration.
Authenticate with email and password. Returns JWT access and refresh tokens.
Revoke the refresh token family. Requires a valid access token.

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated user.

post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair.
Set a new password using the token from the reset email link.
Register a new account. Returns JWT tokens on success. Role is assigned from AUTH_SIGNUP_DEFAULT_ROLE.

get.description: Returns aggregated about page content for the public storefront.
Returns order history for the authenticated customer.
Returns order detail for the authenticated customer.
Returns profile, addresses, and purchase stats for the authenticated customer.

put.description: Updates profile fields and replaces saved addresses for the authenticated customer.

get.description: Get a paginated list of items in the authenticated customer's wishlist.

post.description: Add a product to the authenticated customer's wishlist.

get.description: Returns the number of items in the authenticated customer's wishlist.
Returns all product IDs in the authenticated customer's wishlist for quick heart-state checks.

delete.description: Remove a product from the authenticated customer's wishlist.

get.description: Alias for GET /store/blog/posts for frontend compatibility.
Get all blog categories.
Get a paginated list of published blog posts.
Get a paginated list of approved comments for a blog post.

post.description: Submit a comment on a blog post (needs moderation).

get.description: Get details of a single published blog post by slug.
Get approved comments for a published blog post resolved by slug.
Returns active brands for catalog filters.
Returns the server-side cart with current prices and availability.

delete.description: Removes all items from the server-side cart.

post.description: Adds a product to the server-side cart (increments quantity when line exists).

delete.description: Removes a product line from the server-side cart.

patch.description: Sets cart line quantity; removes the line when quantity is zero.

get.description: Returns the active category tree for the storefront.

post.description: Creates an unpaid storefront order for guest or authenticated customers.
Handles PSP redirect callback after online payment and updates order payment status.
Validates cart items and computes checkout totals without placing an order.

get.description: Returns available delivery options for a destination city.

post.description: Checks whether the provided email or phone belongs to an existing account before guest checkout continues.
Submit a contact inquiry form.
Validates a coupon code against a subtotal in Toman.

get.description: Returns aggregated homepage sections for the storefront.
Returns the active storefront navigation menu.
Returns active products for the public storefront with search, filters, and sort.
Returns quick product suggestions for header autocomplete.
Returns related active products for a product detail page.
Get a paginated list of answered questions for a product.

post.description: Submit a question about a product.

get.description: Get a paginated list of approved reviews for a product.

post.description: Submit a review for a product. Customer ID is linked if authenticated.

get.description: Get aggregate rating stats for a product.
Returns product detail by slug or UUID including variants and SKUs.
Get a paginated list of portfolio projects.
Get all project categories.
Get a single portfolio project by slug.
Returns public site, contact, social, and SEO settings.
Returns minimum order amount, enabled payment methods, and COD availability.
Returns active theme slug, color tokens, and font for CSS variables.
Returns 200 if the process is alive. Used by orchestrators for liveness checks.
Returns 200 if all dependencies (database) are healthy, 503 otherwise.

BearerAuth.description: Enter "Bearer" followed by a space and the JWT access token. Example: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
